name: Turkey Tortilla Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4 quart saucepan, sauté the first three ingredients until the onions are tender.
2. Add the next six ingredients and allow to simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Serve in bowls with half an ounce of cheese and half an ounce of tortilla chips on the bottom.
4. Each serving makes approximately 1.5 cups.
This soup serves eight people, totaling 20 servings.
